ordered_events.detail: Dismounts before fort gate, surrenders to Russian Tsar
ordered_events.quote: he surrenders himself to the will of the Russian Tsar

ordered_events.detail: Enters Vorontsov house with four murids' escort
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad stands at the center

objects.detail: Chimes once as Hadji Murad ignores it
Boy reaches for it; Hadji Murad lets him touch hilt

counts.quote: his four murids sit their horses

ordered_events.detail: Gives gold repeater watch into Hadji Murad's palm
ordered_events.quote: Vorontsov sets the watch in his palm

ordered_events.detail: Hands the watch back to Vorontsov
ordered_events.quote: hands it back face-up

objects.detail: Given to Hadji Murad, examined, handed back
Rests across his knees through the night
Runs finger along grain while waiting

counts.quote: Two men are fighting over the right to file him

ordered_events.detail: Carried in on stretcher, lowered onto the last cot
ordered_events.quote: carried in and lowered onto the last cot

ordered_events.detail: Groans, clamps jaw, presses hands over his belly
ordered_events.quote: presses both hands over his belly

ordered_events.detail: Doctor checks and plasters his exit wound
ordered_events.quote: turns him to check the exit wound

ordered_events.detail: Says old flogging scars were for money he drank
ordered_events.quote: they were for money he drank, long ago

ordered_events.detail: Enters hospital with Serogin, caps in hand
ordered_events.quote: come in caps in hand

ordered_events.detail: Dictates last words home: village, brother, wife
ordered_events.quote: the distance from the village, the brother, the wife

ordered_events.detail: Dies in the night; Panov finds his chest still
ordered_events.quote: leans to the still chest, straightens

objects.detail: Pressed into Avdeev's dying hand, held upright by Panov
Held unlit while watching stretcher pass

injuries.quote: turns him to check the exit wound

injuries.injury: old flogging scars crossing his back
injuries.quote: old flogging scars crossing his back like surveyor's lines

ordered_events.detail: Receives sealed dispatch from courier in doorway
ordered_events.quote: Michael Vorontsov takes a sealed dispatch

objects.detail: Delivered by courier, announces Hadji Murad's defection
Fingers go still on it at mention of Dargo ambush

ordered_events.detail: Enters Vorontsov's cabinet, makes formal submission
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad enters in his white Circassian coat

ordered_events.detail: Leaves cabinet, passes chained wall-clock without slowing
ordered_events.quote: passes a chained wall-clock and does not slow

objects.detail: Hadji Murad passes it without slowing on way out

injuries.quote: crosses the floor with a lame gait

ordered_events.detail: Rises without explanation, walks into theater corridor
ordered_events.quote: walks into the corridor

objects.detail: Whittles wood while recounting his mother's story
Records Hadji Murad's dictated life story

injuries.injury: scar on his ribs from his mother
injuries.quote: finding on his body a scar that belongs to her

ordered_events.detail: Paces in ceremonial dress, fastens silver belt nervously
ordered_events.quote: fastening a silver belt with shaking fingers

ordered_events.detail: Calls for his horse, rides toward Hamzad's camp
ordered_events.quote: He calls for his horse

ordered_events.detail: Rides at Abu Nutsal's stirrup into the mountains
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad rides at his stirrup, into the mountains

ordered_events.detail: Shot inside Hamzad's tent while Shamil blocks Hadji Murad
ordered_events.quote: A single muffled gunshot, like a hand pressed over a mouth

ordered_events.detail: Die alongside Abu Nutsal Khan in Hamzad's tent
ordered_events.quote: the tent where the Khansha's sons lie still

ordered_events.detail: Runs down scree and scrub-oak, does not look back
ordered_events.quote: He runs — down scree and scrub-oak

objects.detail: Fastens it with shaking fingers before riding out
Go slack in his fist as he flees

counts.what: brothers already hostage in Hamzad's camp
counts.quote: two brothers already hostage in Hamzad's camp

injuries.quote: the puckered ridge of a saber scar across her sternum

objects.detail: Presses spring for twelve chimes while confessing shame
Rests across his knees by the fire
Plaits it with fast, tight fingers
Holds it by the dying fire

counts.quote: the four murids keep their separate orbits

injuries.quote: the shortened, twisted limb flat to the floorboards

objects.detail: Breaks Vorontsov's seal to read the dispatch
Reads then folds it with practiced crease
Crosses to cabinet, writes and strikes a line

counts.what: identical packets stacked by his lamp
counts.quote: the twenty identical packets stacked by his lamp

objects.detail: Sets it on the table before standing to demand terms
Traces finger from Vedeno down to the Russian line
Hand rests on hilt, not drawn

counts.what: Cossacks requested for guard of honor
counts.quote: a guard of honor of twenty chosen Cossacks

ordered_events.detail: Slides gold repeater case toward Hadji Murad, who declines it
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad does not take it

objects.detail: Offered across table; Hadji Murad declines to take it
Pours himself, no servant present
Pauses in doorway to refill it

ordered_events.detail: Brings folded authorization sheet to Hadji Murad
ordered_events.quote: brings it to Hadji Murad in a single folded sheet

ordered_events.detail: Folds the sheet, hands it back without a word
ordered_events.quote: folds it along its crease and hands it back

objects.detail: Opens the folder for Nicholas's review
Grants cooperation but names none of his hostage family

counts.what: times Polish Catholic must pass through the line
counts.quote: pass twelve times through a thousand men

ordered_events.detail: Vorontsov and Hadji Murad ride back without speaking
ordered_events.quote: They ride back without speaking

ordered_events.detail: Enters ruined aoul on foot, stops at broken gate
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad enters on foot, stops at the broken gate

ordered_events.detail: Found dead under a burka in ruined courtyard
ordered_events.quote: the small shape of Sado's son

objects.detail: Covers the small shape of Sado's dead son
Hadji Murad sets hand on the shaft to help dig
Collapsed beams, smoke, ash after destruction

injuries.quote: fingernails dragging blood from her own face

ordered_events.detail: Rides into fort street on a chestnut horse
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad on a chestnut, moving in tight controlled steps

objects.detail: Hangs from his extended two fingers as greeting
Reads orders without sitting, still chewing bread
Rings on iron in place of a verbal answer
Hand rests on hilt while assessing the room

ordered_events.detail: Rides into Vedeno amid celebratory gunfire
ordered_events.quote: rides into Vedeno on a white Arab

ordered_events.detail: Takes sealed prisoner list from a murid without a glance
ordered_events.quote: a murid presents a sealed prisoner list and Shamil takes it

objects.detail: Presented by a murid; Shamil takes it without a glance

ordered_events.detail: Intercepted before reaching Russian line, held under guard
ordered_events.quote: were intercepted before they reached the Russian line

ordered_events.detail: Intercepted before reaching Russian line, held under guard
ordered_events.quote: were intercepted before they reached the Russian line

ordered_events.detail: Intercepted before reaching Russian line, held under guard
ordered_events.quote: were intercepted before they reached the Russian line

ordered_events.detail: Brought up from the pit to write letter under duress
ordered_events.quote: Yusuf is brought up from the pit, thin, reeking

ordered_events.detail: Snatches a dagger, drives it at his own throat
ordered_events.quote: Yusuf snatches a dagger and drives it at his own throat

ordered_events.detail: Murids wrench his arm, force him back into the dark
ordered_events.quote: murids wrench his arm and force him back into the dark

objects.detail: Reads proclamation; scribe presses seal after Shamil's nod
Pressed onto the proclamation after Shamil's nod
Shaking over paper as he is forced to write
Snatched and driven toward his own throat, then wrenched away
Will travel to the Russian fort like a blade

counts.quote: all three now held under guard in Vedeno

ordered_events.detail: Carries Hadji Murad's tray through the house
ordered_events.quote: Eldar carries Hadji Murad's tray through

objects.detail: Holds it in kitchen doorway, directed to water
Carries Hadji Murad's tray through the house

counts.what: words in Hadji Murad's praise of the song
counts.quote: four words from a man who has recognized his own obituary

ordered_events.detail: Gives white burka to Marya Dmitrievna with both hands
ordered_events.quote: holds it out with both hands

ordered_events.detail: Gives the Gurda sword to Major Petrov
ordered_events.quote: The Gurda sword goes to Petrov

ordered_events.detail: Mounts and rides away from the fort with his men
ordered_events.quote: The riders dwindle

objects.detail: Given by Hadji Murad via Eldar as a parting gift
Given by Hadji Murad as a parting gift

injuries.quote: Hadji Murad limps to Marya Dmitrievna
